messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Make 'which agent bounces most from QA' answerable: a structured QA bounce-verdict record (written at bounce time), a one-time backfill from the evidence corpus, and a per-role / per-ticket-type tally on a host-side surface
How it works: Recording a bounce captures its producing role, ticket type, and failure class

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-454 - Make 'which agent bounces most from QA' answerable: a structured QA bounce-verdict record (written at bounce time), a one-time backfill from the evidence corpus, and a per-role / per-ticket-type tally on a host-side surface is complete.
